articles.title: 1,500 Beagles Rescued from Testing Lab Are Getting Second Chance at Happy Lives
articles.summary: Imagine 1,500 beagles who've never felt grass under their paws. They were just freed from a Wisconsin research facility, and now groups are finding them real homes. The first 300 dogs left on Friday, with more to follow.

articles.title: Gas Prices Jump Over 30 Cents in a Week—Here's Why Your Family Road Trip Might Cost More
articles.summary: Gas prices shot up more than 30 cents a gallon last week, hitting $4.446 on average. The big reason? A key waterway called the Strait of Hormuz is closed because of the war in Iran. Experts say prices could keep climbing for weeks or even months.

articles.title: 19-Year-Old Kimi Antonelli Makes F1 History with Third Straight Win in Miami
articles.summary: Teenage driver Kimi Antonelli won the Miami Grand Prix, becoming the first F1 driver ever to win his first three races from pole position. He beat world champion Lando Norris by 3.2 seconds and now leads the championship by 20 points.
